issues.title: every sse  url  cannot  be connected successfully   ！！help！！
issues.body:
**application.properties:**

spring.ai.mcp.client.sse.connections.server1.url= "https://mcp-d8512d23-412f-46b1.api-inference.modelscope.cn


**code like this： **

client: 

private final ToolCallbackProvider tools;
private final ChatClient.Builder chatClientBuilder;

chatClientBuilder
                    .defaultTools(tools)
                    .defaultAdvisors(
                            new PromptChatMemoryAdvisor(chatMemory),
                            new LoggingAdvisor()
                    )
                    .build();

private Flux<String> processUserInput(String input) {
		return chatClient.prompt()
				.system(s -> s.param("current_date", LocalDate.now().toString()))
				.user(input)
				.advisors(a -> a.param(CHAT_MEMORY_CONVERSATION_ID_KEY, sessionId)
						.param(CHAT_MEMORY_RETRIEVE_SIZE_KEY, 100))
				.stream()
				.chatResponse()
				.flatMap(response -> sinkHandler.handleTextResponse(response));
	}

when  i start the demo ，it look very nice，but few seconds later， it always failed with  ERROR  “Received unrecognized SSE event type: null”    

next details error ：

2025-04-29 17:23:07 INFO  o.s.b.w.e.tomcat.TomcatWebServer - Tomcat started on port 9004 (http) with context path '/'

comments.body: the  sse  url gived  is a openUrl ，you can test it！
